title: Theo's Big Cooking Adventure
synopsis: When Theo's grandma comes to visit, he embarks on his first big cooking adventure to make her famous apple pie. With help from his family, Theo learns that cooking together creates the sweetest memories of all.

pages.text: Theo bounced up and down in his kitchen chair. Today was special! Grandma Rose was coming to visit, and she always brought the best hugs and stories. But this time, Theo had a big surprise planned for her.

illustration.description: A cozy kitchen with warm yellow walls and orange morning light streaming through windows. Theo, a boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes, sits at a wooden dining table wearing striped pajamas, looking excited. Steam rises from a coffee pot on the counter, and flour containers sit on shelves.
illustration.alt: Theo sits excitedly at the kitchen table in morning pajamas

pages.text: 'Mom!' Theo called out. 'Can we make Grandma's apple pie before she gets here?' His mom smiled and ruffled his curly hair. 'That's a wonderful idea, sweetie. But making apple pie is quite an adventure. Are you ready for that?'

illustration.description: The warm kitchen scene continues with Theo's mom, wearing a yellow apron, standing beside Theo who has short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes. Sunlight creates golden patches on the wooden dining table where recipe books are scattered. Steam from morning cooking creates a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Theo's mom in a yellow apron talks with Theo at the kitchen table

pages.text: Theo nodded his head so fast his curls bounced. 'Yes! I want to make the best apple pie ever!' His dad peeked around the corner. 'Did someone say apple pie? Count me in!' Soon the whole family was gathered in their cozy kitchen, ready to start their cooking adventure.

illustration.description: The entire family gathers in the cozy kitchen with warm orange and yellow lighting. Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands between his parents. Dad wears a blue apron, mom wears yellow. Flour containers and cooking ingredients are spread across the wooden dining table, with steam rising from the stove.
illustration.alt: The whole family gathers excitedly in the warm kitchen ready to cook

pages.text: First, they needed the right clothes for cooking. Mom tied a small green apron around Theo's waist. 'Every good chef needs an apron,' she said with a wink. Theo looked down at his apron and felt very important and grown-up.

illustration.description: In the bright kitchen with warm yellow walls, Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands proudly wearing a small green apron. His mom kneels beside him adjusting the apron ties. Flour dusts the wooden dining table behind them, and golden morning light streams through windows creating a cozy family gathering atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Mom helps Theo put on his cooking apron in the sunny kitchen

pages.text: Next came the ingredients. Dad helped Theo carry the bag of apples to the table. 'These are Grandma's favorite - Granny Smith apples!' Mom brought flour, sugar, and butter. 'And these will make our pie crust nice and flaky,' she explained.

illustration.description: The family kitchen filled with cooking ingredients on the wooden dining table. Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes holds a bag of green apples while his dad points to them. Flour containers, butter, and sugar are arranged on the table. Warm orange light fills the cozy kitchen scene with steam rising from a kettle.
illustration.alt: Theo and dad arrange fresh apples and baking ingredients on the kitchen table

pages.text: Theo rolled up his sleeves just like he'd seen Grandma do. 'I'm ready!' he announced. His parents laughed at his serious expression. They were ready too - ready for flour everywhere, sticky fingers, and lots of family fun in their favorite room of the house.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes has his sleeves rolled up and stands ready at the wooden dining table covered in baking ingredients. His parents stand nearby smiling. The cozy kitchen glows with warm yellows and oranges, flour already dusting surfaces, creating an atmosphere of everyday love moments and family gathering.
illustration.alt: Theo stands ready to cook with sleeves rolled up while parents smile nearby

pages.text: Making pie crust was trickier than Theo thought! He tried to roll the dough, but it stuck to everything - the rolling pin, the counter, and especially his hands. 'Help!' he giggled as flour puffed up in little white clouds around him.

illustration.description: The cozy kitchen is now wonderfully messy with flour clouds in the air. Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes laughs while covered in flour, holding a rolling pin. The wooden dining table and surrounding area are dusted white with flour. Warm yellow kitchen lighting makes the flour sparkle like snow in this everyday love moment.
illustration.alt: Theo laughs while covered in flour clouds during pie crust making

pages.text: Dad showed Theo how to peel apples safely with a small peeler. 'Turn the apple, not the peeler,' Dad said. Soon they had a bowl full of perfect apple slices. 'You're getting really good at this!' Mom cheered from where she was fixing their pie crust.

illustration.description: At the wooden dining table in the warm kitchen, Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes carefully peels apples with his dad's help. A bowl of perfect apple slices sits between them. The kitchen maintains its cozy atmosphere with warm oranges and yellows, steam from cooking, and the homemade food preparation creating a family gathering scene.
illustration.alt: Theo learns to peel apples with dad's guidance at the kitchen table

pages.text: The best part was mixing the apple filling. Theo measured cinnamon and sugar while Mom held the bowl steady. 'This smells just like Grandma's kitchen!' Theo said, breathing in the sweet, spicy scent. His family smiled - their kitchen was starting to smell like love.

illustration.description: The family kitchen filled with the warm glow of cooking together. Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes measures spices while mom holds a large mixing bowl of sliced apples. Cinnamon and sugar containers are open on the wooden dining table. Steam and the golden light create a cozy kitchen home atmosphere of everyday love moments.
illustration.alt: Theo adds cinnamon and sugar to apple filling while mom helps

pages.text: Just as they put the pie in the oven, the doorbell rang. 'Grandma!' Theo shouted, running to the door with flour still in his hair. Grandma Rose gave him the biggest hug. 'My goodness, Theo! Have you been having a cooking adventure without me?'

illustration.description: The front door opens to show Grandma Rose hugging Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes, who still has flour in his curls and on his green apron. Behind them, the cozy kitchen home glows with warm yellow and orange light, steam visible from the oven where the pie bakes. This captures an everyday love moment of family gathering.
illustration.alt: Grandma Rose hugs flour-covered Theo at the front door with kitchen visible behind

pages.text: Grandma Rose sniffed the air and smiled. 'Is that my apple pie I smell?' Theo beamed with pride. 'I made it for you, Grandma! Well, Mom and Dad helped a little bit.' He took her hand and led her to the kitchen where the golden pie was cooling on the counter.

illustration.description: In the warm kitchen, Grandma Rose and Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes admire the golden-brown pie cooling on the counter. The cozy kitchen home is filled with the warm glow of family cooking together, steam rising from the fresh pie. The wooden dining table and warm yellows and oranges create the perfect family gathering scene with homemade food.
illustration.alt: Grandma and Theo admire the golden pie cooling in the warm kitchen

pages.text: As they all sat around the dining table sharing the warm pie, Grandma Rose had tears of joy in her eyes. 'This is the most delicious pie I've ever tasted,' she said, 'because it was made with so much love.' Theo's heart felt as warm and sweet as the pie itself.

illustration.description: The family sits around the wooden dining table sharing slices of golden pie. Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sits between his parents across from Grandma Rose. The cozy kitchen home glows with warm yellow and orange light, steam rising from the pie slices. This perfect family gathering scene embodies everyday love moments with homemade food bringing everyone together.
illustration.alt: The whole family enjoys pie together around the dining table in warm kitchen light

metadata.illustrationStyle: cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food

questions.question: Why was Theo excited at the beginning of the story?
choices: Grandma Rose was coming to visit
He was going to the park
questions.explanation: Theo was excited because Grandma Rose was coming to visit and he wanted to surprise her with a homemade apple pie.

questions.question: What did Theo wear while cooking?
questions.explanation: Theo wore a small green apron that his mom tied around his waist to help him look like a real chef.

questions.question: What kind of apples did they use for the pie?
questions.explanation: They used Granny Smith apples because those were Grandma Rose's favorite kind of apples for pie.

questions.question: What happened when Theo tried to roll the pie dough?
choices: It stuck to everything and made flour clouds
questions.explanation: The dough stuck to the rolling pin, counter, and Theo's hands, creating funny flour clouds that made everyone laugh.

questions.question: Why did Grandma Rose say the pie was the most delicious?
questions.explanation: Grandma Rose said it was the most delicious pie because it was made with so much love by her family.
